chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory When an Animal Strikes a Person with Its Front or Hind Legs

text: 5350 - وَ رَوَى يُونُسُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اَلرَّحْمَنِ رَفَعَهُ إِلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "بَهِيمَةُ اَلْأَنْعَامِ لاَ يَغْرَمُ أَهْلُهَا شَيْئاً مَا دَامَتْ مُرْسَلَةً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5350 - Yunus ibn Abd Al-Rahman narrated, raising it to Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"The owners of livestock are not liable for anything as long as the animals are left to roam freely."
